headline: 44 contracts catalogued across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Mantle, Plume, Sei, BNB Chain (unlisted), plus non-EVM presence on Solana, Aptos, Sui, Noble, Stellar, and XRP Ledger; official deployments doc covers all active and legacy addresses across OUSG, USDY, and GM product lines.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search surfaced: ONDO token (0xfAbA6f8e4a5E8Ab82F62fe7C39859FA577269BE3), USDY token (0x96F6eF951840721AdBF46Ac996b59E0235CB985C), OUSG Holdings 1 / Safe multisig (0x72Be8C14B7564f7a61ba2f6B7E50D18DC1D4B63D), OUSG Instant Manager 2 (0x93358db7…), OUSG Manager legacy (0xF16c188c…), legacy USDY Manager (0x25A103A1…), USDY Price Oracle (0xa0219aa5…), Deployer EOA (0xe2d0f9dc…). Arbiscan surfaced USDY-Arbitrum (0x35e050d3…). Polygon, Mantle, Plume, Sei, BNB Chain explorers not directly fetched; coverage obtained from D2.

Official deployments doc at docs.ondo.finance/addresses fetched; lists 44 contracts/addresses across OUSG (Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, XRP Ledger), USDY (Ethereum, Mantle, Solana, Sui, Aptos, Noble, Arbitrum, Stellar, Plume, Sei), GM (Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana), Ondo Bridge (Ethereum, Mantle, Arbitrum, Solana), and legacy contracts. Deployed_contracts_doc set to https://docs.ondo.finance/addresses.

Audit page fetched at docs.ondo.finance/audits listing 20+ audits: Code4rena (Jan 2023, Sep 2023, Apr 2024), Spearbit (Mar 2025, Jun 2025), Cyfrin (Apr 2024, Jul 2025), Halborn (Feb 2025, Jun/Jul 2024), Zokyo (Aug 2023), Nethermind (Apr 2023), FYEO (Sep/Nov 2025), Cantina (multiple 2025–2026), Zellic (Dec 2025), ABDK, Quantstamp, Peckshield, Certik. No in-scope address tables extracted from PDFs this run (audit PDFs not directly fetched).

GitHub org github.com/ondoprotocol fetched; public repos include: usdy (Solidity), usdy-noble (Go), global-markets-solana (Rust), usdy-aptos (Move), ondo-v1 (TypeScript), ondo-global-markets-token-list. Repo ondoprotocol/tokenized-funds referenced in docs for CashKYCSenderReceiver.sol and KYCRegistry.sol but not visible in public repo list (may be private or renamed). No pinned deployment artifacts (run-latest.json, deployments.json) directly fetched this run.

12 chains in protocol.chains processed. EVM chains covered: Ethereum (D1+D2), Arbitrum (D1+D2), Polygon (D2), Mantle (D2), Plume Mainnet (D2), Sei (D2). Non-EVM addressed in D2 docs: Solana (OUSG, USDY, GM program IDs), Aptos (USDY), Sui (USDY), Noble (ausdy), Stellar (USDY), Ripple/XRP Ledger (OUSG). BNB Chain present in deployed contracts doc but absent from protocol.chains; 4 contracts enumerated. Explorer-level verification of Plume, Sei, Mantle, Solana, Aptos, Sui, Noble, Stellar, Ripple not possible this run.

GM Tokens on Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Solana are enumerated in a Dropbox CSV linked from docs.ondo.finance/addresses; the CSV URL (dropbox.com/scl/fi/qjfxyg748mx0dwi6up86d/…) was not fetchable this run. GMTokenManager and GMTokenLimitOrder serve as the effective factory-level entry points. Cap notice: individual GM token addresses not catalogued pending CSV retrieval.

Role taxonomy applied across all 44 admin_addresses entries: token (OUSG, USDY, rUSDY, USDYc, USDon, mUSD, ONDO), admin (managers, instant managers, cash managers), oracle (OndoOracle, RWADynamicOracle, SyntheticSharesOracle), vault/treasury (Coinbase Prime custodian addresses), multisig (OUSG Holdings 1 confirmed as Safe), other (OFT adapters, deployer EOA, blocklists, registries).

All 44 admin_addresses entries trace to docs.ondo.finance/addresses (D2, primary), or corroborated by Etherscan/Arbiscan search-grounded page content (D1). No address is sourced solely from training memory.

rationale.verdict: Deployed contracts doc fetched directly; Etherscan/Arbiscan search-grounded pages confirmed key Ethereum and Arbitrum addresses on-chain. 44 contracts catalogued across 14 chains/networks from official docs and explorer searches. Non-EVM chains (Solana, Noble, Stellar, Aptos, Sui, Ripple) addressed via docs only. BNB Chain contracts found in docs despite being absent from protocol.chains. GM individual token list (Dropbox CSV) and proxy-admin addresses remain unresolved.

evidence.shows: Official deployments doc listing 44 contract addresses across OUSG, USDY, GM, and Bridge product lines on Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Mantle, Plume, Sei, BNB Chain and non-EVM chains
Audit reports page listing 20+ audits from Code4rena, Spearbit, Cantina, Cyfrin, Halborn, Zellic, FYEO, Zokyo, Nethermind, Trail of Bits, ABDK, Quantstamp, Peckshield, Certik spanning 2021–2026

Trust and security page describing OUSG as tokenized LP interests in US Treasuries funds and USDY as a tokenized note secured by US Treasuries and bank deposits; describes institutional partners including Coinbase Prime, BlackRock BUIDL
Ondo Finance bug bounty program on Immunefi with up to $250,000 max payout for smart contract critical vulnerabilities; rewards in USDC on Ethereum
Ondo Finance GitHub org with public repos: usdy (Solidity), usdy-noble (Go), global-markets-solana (Rust), usdy-aptos (Move), ondo-v1 (TypeScript), ondo-global-markets-token-list
Etherscan name-tags 'Ondo Finance: OUSG Holdings 1' and 'Smart Account by Safe'; holds ~$141.9M in BlackRock BUIDL; confirms this is a Safe multisig serving as OUSG custodian/recipient
USDY token on Ethereum; Etherscan confirms TokenProxy (TransparentUpgradeableProxy), tagged as 'Ondo Finance: USDY Token'
ONDO governance token on Ethereum; Etherscan confirms: 'The ONDO token will govern the Ondo Finance protocol'; 10B total supply; ~189K holders
Etherscan name-tag 'Ondo Finance: Deployer'; EOA deployer address for Ondo Finance

Etherscan name-tag 'Ondo Finance: OUSG Instant Manager 2'; contract code shows BaseRWAManager with OndoIDRegistry, OndoCompliance, OndoTokenRouter dependencies; subscribe/redeem pausing, ADMIN_SUBSCRIPTION_ROLE
Etherscan name-tag 'Ondo Finance: USDY Price Oracle'; RWADynamicOracle contract with SETTER_ROLE and PAUSER_ROLE; stores USDY price ranges
USDY token on Arbitrum; Arbiscan confirms ERC-20 proxy, tagged 'Ondo Finance · Real World Assets'; implementation at 0x5692349f…43187304C
OUSG token on Ethereum; TokenProxy (TransparentUpgradeableProxy) confirmed from Etherscan source code; tagged 'Ondo Finance: OUSG Token'

unknowns: D1: BNB Chain — present in deployed contracts doc but absent from protocol.chains; BscScan direct fetch not attempted; GMTokenManager (0x91f8Aff3…), USDon (0x1f8955E6…) addresses from docs only
D3: Audit PDF in-scope address tables not extracted (PDF files not directly fetched this run); proxy-admin addresses for OUSG and USDY TransparentUpgradeableProxy not read on-chain

D4: ondoprotocol/tokenized-funds repo referenced in docs for CashKYCSenderReceiver.sol and KYCRegistry.sol but not visible in public GitHub org listing; deployment artifacts (run-latest.json, addresses.json) not fetched at pinned SHA
D5: Solana — block explorer search not possible via EVM tools; OUSG, USDY, GM program IDs sourced from docs only; cannot verify on-chain
D5: Noble, Stellar, Aptos, Sui — non-EVM chains; addresses sourced from docs only; no on-chain verification this run
D5: Ripple/XRP Ledger — OUSG issuer account rHuiXXjHLpMP8ZE9sSQU5aADQVWDwv6h5p from docs; non-EVM; not verifiable this run
D5: Sei — seiscan.io not fetched; USDY address 0x54cD901491AeF397084453F4372B93c33260e2A6 from docs only
D5: Plume Mainnet — Plume explorer not fetched; USDY address 0xD2B65e851Be3d80D3c2ce795eB2E78f16cB088b2 from docs only
D5: Mantle — Mantle explorer not fetched; USDY, mUSD, Redemption Price Oracle, Blocklist, Mantle OFT Adapter addresses from docs only

D6: GM individual token addresses on Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana — referenced in Dropbox CSV at docs.ondo.finance/addresses but Dropbox URL not fetchable this run; individual token contract addresses not catalogued
D6: offchain — Dropbox CSV fetch for GM tokens failed: https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/qjfxyg748mx0dwi6up86d/EXTERNAL-Ondo-GM-Tokens-Ondo-GM-Tokens.csv not fetchable
D1: Proxy-admin addresses for OUSG (0x1B19C1…) and USDY (0x96F6eF…) TransparentUpgradeableProxy not read on-chain (defipunkd API not used; no pinned addresses in address_book)

protocol_metadata.about: Ondo Finance allows users to subscribe (invest USDC) and redeem tokenized US Treasury and yield-bearing products: OUSG is a tokenized limited partnership interest in a fund holding short-term US Treasuries (primarily via BlackRock BUIDL), available to KYC-verified Qualified Purchasers; USDY is a tokenized note backed by US Treasuries and bank demand deposits, available to non-US persons under Regulation S. Ondo Global Markets (GM) extends the product suite to tokenized equities and other financial assets, supporting on-chain minting/redemption via a GMTokenManager and limit-order contract. Both OUSG and USDY tokens are proxied (TransparentUpgradeableProxy) and transfer-restricted via on-chain KYC registries and blocklists; cross-chain access is facilitated via LayerZero OFT adapters across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Mantle, and Solana.
